auth.title: NYUSH Course Reviews
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your NYU account to browse and post course reviews

buttons.googleSignIn: Sign in with your NYU Google account

credit.suffix: maintained by generations of students — thank you

errors.domainNotAllowed: Only @nyu.edu accounts can sign in — please choose your NYU account

list.loadFailedDesc: Network or server error. Please refresh the page.
list.emptyDesc: Try adjusting filters or a different search keyword.

detail.notFoundDesc: It may have been removed or the link is wrong. Please go back to the course list.

submit.title: Add a course
submit.description: Fill in the basics and classification. You'll be taken to the detail page after submission.

fields.campusHint: To add a course for another campus, switch campus in the topbar first.
fields.shEquivalentHint: e.g. CSCI-SHU 210. Links to the existing Shanghai course, or auto-creates one with the same name if it doesn't exist yet
fields.chipHint: Type a name and press Enter / Tab / comma to add

validation.nameTooShort: Course name must be at least 3 characters
validation.classificationRequired: Select at least one classification (including General Elective)
validation.lectureProfRequired: At least 1 lecture professor is required

toasts.submitGenericError: Submission failed: please review all fields
toasts.submitFailedRetry: Submission failed, please try again later

card.confirmDeleteDesc: Soft delete — only you will see it, and you can restore anytime.

list.emptyWithFilterDesc: Switch to "All professors" to see others
list.emptyDescCanWrite: Tap "Write a review" above to be the first.

form.noProfHint: This course has no professors yet — fill in below.
form.siteFollowsCampus: This review will be tagged as taken at {site}. If that's wrong, switch campus in the topbar first.

validation.newProfRequired: Please enter the new professor name
validation.contentRequired: Please fill in at least one of Chinese or English content
validation.contentTooLong: Each field is limited to {max} characters

toasts.duplicate: You've already reviewed this professor + semester combination
toasts.rateLimited: Too many submissions — try again in an hour

submit.title: Write a review
submit.description: Select professor and semester, then share your honest thoughts (zh or en is fine).

reviews.title: Your reviews
reviews.emptyDesc: Pick a course from the list and share your thoughts.
reviews.filteredEmptyDesc: Check "Show deleted" to see all your reviews

anonymousId.resetConfirmDesc: All your existing reviews will immediately show the new ID (the old one leaves no trace). This cannot be undone.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for may have been removed, the link is wrong, or it's temporarily unavailable.

server.title: Something went wrong
server.description: Either the server or the frontend hit an error. Please refresh, or try again later.
